subcodes.first_line: Glorified is He Who speaketh in the nights and the days, at eventide and at dawn, and sendeth down verses as He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ینطق فی اللیالی و الایام و فی العشی و الاشراق و ینزل الایات کیف
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @Word of God and human limitations, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment
